name: rubric loop action card emitted from friction events includes the offending rule_id and the suppression count that triggered it
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do printf '{"event":"inline-suppression","rule_id":"no-console","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:0%dZ"}\n' "$i" >> .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/cross-loop-emit.sh" --target rubric-action-cards --threshold 5 --since 1d 2>err.txt && grep -q 'rule_id: no-console' .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/action-cards.yaml && grep -q 'suppression_count: 6' .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/action-cards.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
